title: Parker Tricarico - Foster Global
content:
Parker Tricarico is an attorney in the Houston office of Foster LLP. His practice focuses primarily on employment-based immigration. Prior to joining the firm, he worked at a boutique immigration law firm in New York City.
He graduated from Whittier Law School where he served as a Senior Editor of the Whittier Law Review and Associate Editor of the Whittier Law Journal of Child and Family Advocacy. Prior to law school, he received his undergraduate degree in Political Science from the University of Alabama.
He is admitted to the State Bar of New York and is a member of the New York State Bar Association.
